name: gulf-of-mannar-demo
description: Act 2 scripted story. Frame t_ms are realistic AIS event times (vessels report every 60-300s), so implied speeds are honest and only the intended spoof teleports. 'speed' compresses playback wall-clock (60x here) so the action reads on stage; it does NOT compress the dark-event silence threshold, which is real wall-clock (6x expected interval ~ 60s for an 8kn vessel). Beats: Ghost teleports (spoof, ~2s), Meen Rani crosses into the MPA (zone, ~10s), Kadal Selvi goes dark 1.5nm from the MPA and the cone + intercept bloom at the silence threshold (~60s after its last fix). Non-dark vessels anchor (speed <= 1kn) so only Kadal Selvi goes dark.
